nws.name: Overnight
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of rain showers and patchy fog. Mostly cloudy. Low around 62, with temperatures rising to around 72 overnight. South wind around 9 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%.

nws.name: Monday
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of rain showers and patchy fog before 7am, then showers and thunderstorms likely between 7am and 1pm, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms. Some of the storms could be severe. Partly sunny. High near 78, with temperatures falling to around 75 in the afternoon. North wind 6 to 13 mph, with gusts as high as 23 mph. Chance of precipitation is 70%. New rainfall amounts between a quarter and half of an inch possible.

nws.name: Monday Night
nws.shortForecast: Chance Showers And Thunderstorms then Mostly Clear
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms before 9pm. Some of the storms could be severe. Mostly clear. Low around 54, with temperatures rising to around 56 overnight. Southwest wind 9 to 13 mph, with gusts as high as 22 mph. Chance of precipitation is 40%. New rainfall amounts between a quarter and half of an inch possible.

nws.name: Tuesday
nws.detailedForecast: Sunny, with a high near 81. Southwest wind 13 to 24 mph, with gusts as high as 36 mph.

nws.name: Tuesday Night
nws.detailedForecast: Mostly clear, with a low around 57. West wind 3 to 20 mph, with gusts as high as 30 mph.

nws.name: Wednesday
nws.detailedForecast: Mostly sunny, with a high near 84. Southwest wind 2 to 6 mph.

nws.detailedForecast: A slight chance of showers and thunderstorms before 7am, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms. Mostly sunny, with a high near 88. Southeast wind 3 to 10 mph.

nws.name: Saturday Night
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms before 7pm, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms. Partly cloudy, with a low around 59. Northwest wind 5 to 13 mph, with gusts as high as 20 mph.
